copyPasteValue: A practical course helping local CSO staff apply human rights-based approaches to safe, evidence-informed advocacy work.
notes: Appears on course catalogue card and course detail preview.

copyPasteValue: This course helps local and grassroots CSO staff translate human rights-based principles into practical advocacy planning. Participants explore rights holders, duty bearers, participation, non-discrimination, accountability, evidence use, risk awareness, and safe engagement. By the end, participants prepare a simple HRBA advocacy action outline for a real issue in their context.
notes: Appears on public course detail page and creator preview.
